assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 13 records 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (imprecise -- no exact threshold in Jira description)' and line 14 records 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (imprecise -- no exact version in Jira description)'. Line 50 explicitly states: 'The Jira description does not provide a precise affected version range or fixed version for h2.' The Critical Data Gap section (lines 48-51) confirms external enrichment is required.

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 13-24 document querying the MITRE CVE API at https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901. The parsed fields table shows 'Affected range | lessThan 0.4.8 (semver)' and 'Version type | semver'. Line 24 states: 'The MITRE record provides a structured lessThan constraint: all h2 versions below 0.4.8 are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 27-42 document querying the OSV.dev API at https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901. The parsed fields table shows 'Introduced | 0 (all versions from the start)' and 'Fixed | 0.4.8' with 'Range type | SEMVER'. Line 42 states: 'The OSV.dev record confirms that the vulnerability was introduced from the initial release and is fixed in version 0.4.8.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md lines 45-64 contain a Cross-Validation section with a comparison table showing MITRE (< 0.4.8) and OSV.dev (fixed 0.4.8) side by side. Line 54 states: 'MITRE and OSV.dev agree on the fix threshold: 0.4.8'. The Enriched Fix Threshold table (lines 58-62) records 'Fix threshold | 0.4.8 | MITRE CVE API + OSV.dev (cross-validated)' with 'Confidence | High | Two independent external sources agree'. Line 64 explicitly states: 'The enriched fix threshold of 0.4.8 will be used in Step 2.3 for version impact comparisons.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md line 5 states: 'Enriched fix threshold: 0.4.8 (from Step 1.5 cross-validation of MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev)'. All version comparisons use 0.4.8 as the threshold (e.g., line 19: '0.4.5 < 0.4.8', line 25: '0.4.8 >= 0.4.8'). No imprecise Jira description data ('versions prior to the fix' or 'see advisory') is used for any version comparison. The threshold is explicitly attributed to the Step 1.5 enrichment, not to the Jira description.
